provisions.content: This Order may be cited as the Public Recreation Grounds (Orkesumet) Order.

Each of the areas of public land in Orkesumet, Simanjiro District, Arusha Region described in the Schedule is hereby declared to be a public recreation ground for the purposes of the Public Recreation Grounds Act. Schedule All that area of land in Block "B" within Orkesumet identifies as plot Nos. 19 and 116 on survey Plan No. E 6 240/2 and plot No. 138 on survey plan No. E 6 240/4 held by the Director of Surveys and Mapping, Ministry of Lands, Housing and Urban Development.
